string.name: permission_internet_reason
string.value: 用于播放网络音乐流和获取电台数据

string.name: permission_network_reason
string.value: 用于检测网络状态以优化播放体验

string.name: permission_read_media_reason
string.value: 用于读取本地音乐文件

string.name: permission_write_media_reason
string.value: 用于保存播放列表和下载的音乐

string.name: permission_background_reason
string.value: 用于在后台继续播放音乐
